title: CrafterEarly
description: Port the Crafter from Minecraft 1.21 to Minecraft 1.20.1, with compatibility for schematics and world save upgrades.
body:
# Crafter Early
[简体中文](https://github.com/chenjunfu2/crafter-early-1.20.1/blob/1.20.1/README.md)  
This is a mod that perfectly ports the **``Minecraft 1.21 Crafter``** to **``Minecraft 1.20.1``**, bringing the full Crafter features and advancements back to **``Minecraft 1.20.1``**.  
Since this mod uses vanilla namespaces and data formats, it is compatible with Crafters in higher-version schematics loaded by Litematica Mod, and upgraded world saves can also be recognized and preserved in higher versions.  

## Description
This project is modified from [QuackImpala7321-AutoCrafterEarly](https://github.com/QuackImpala7321/AutoCrafterEarly)  

**Compared to the original ported mod:**
- Fixed Crafter cooldown to 4gt (was 1gt previously)
- Fixed unexpected GUI behavior for mouse double-click events and slot swap events
- Fixed resource files to use vanilla namespace for resource pack compatibility
- Fixed incorrect texture rotation
- Added porting of related advancements
- Added porting of Chinese language file
  
## Requirements
**Game Version**: **``Minecraft 1.20.1``**  
**Loader Version**: **``Fabric 0.14.22+``**  
**Fabric API**: **``0.92.3+``** (since 0.92.3 fixes a bug that may cause issues with this mod)  
**Multiplayer**: Must be installed on both **``Server``** and **``Client``**  
**Singleplayer**: Only need to install on **``Client``**  

## Incompatibilities
- **BBOR (Bounding Box Outline Reloaded)** – This mod has a serious bug that causes abnormal mining time increases for this mod's blocks and may lead to blocks not dropping any items when broken. Since BBOR is no longer maintained, this incompatibility will not be fixed.  
  
## Note
- If installed only on the server and not on the client, issues such as **“Missing mod”** or **“Block ID cannot be resolved”** may occur when connecting to this server.  
- If installed only on the client, you **can still join a server that does not have this mod installed** (the client-side mod blocks will not take effect on that server).
